summary: ANDROID | Low battery notification shown on app cold start despite full battery
scenario: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on cold start despite high battery level
description_clean: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on app cold start (first launch, no memory) even when the device battery level is high. Expected behavior: no low battery notification should be shown if battery level is sufficient.
steps: 1. Ensure the app is not running in memory (cold start condition).
2. Set the device battery level to a high value (e.g., above 50%).
3. Launch the app for the first time (cold start).
4. Observe the notification displayed on the screen.
expected: No low battery notification should be shown if battery level is sufficient.
actual: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on app cold start even when the device battery level is high.
